## Risk assessment (pick one)
- [ ] Safe - small / localized change; unlikely to break other work
- [ ] Euclid - moderate; touches shared systems / scenes
- [ ] Keter - large; touches core systems (save / load,, build pipeline, etc.)
- [ ] Apollyon - emergency; overwrites major systems / very wide impact
